loot.name: Iron Fins of the Leviathan
loot.skill1:
Cascade
0.58s
17.5% Strength + 17.5% Dexterity + 17.5% Strength + 17.5% Dexterity · Physical
Strikes with both weapons, dealing 35% Strength + 35% Dexterity Physical to an enemy and increasing your [CritDamage] by 2% to 4% for 15, stacking up to 5 times.
loot.skill2:
Abyssal Fury
cd 20s · 0.4s
Imbues your weapons with tide power for 8, giving all your [Attack]s a 0.3 chance to blast 15% Strength + 15% Dexterity Physical. Blasted damage is considered as an [Attack].
loot.skill3:
Groundswell Strike
cd 10s · 0.4s
47.5% Strength + 47.5% Dexterity · Physical
Deals 47.5% Strength + 47.5% Dexterity Physical to nearby enemies. All your [Attack]s reduce the cooldown by 1.5.
loot.passive:
Tide Warlord
Your [PhysicalMastery] is increased by 15% while fighting under 50% [Health].

loot.name: Ghost Clams of the Low Tide
loot.skill1:
Surging Tide
1.3s
38.5% Intellect + 38.5% Faith · Magic
Releases two water bolts, each dealing 38.5% Intellect + 38.5% Faith Magic to an enemy. Damage increased by 10% for each active [Totem].
loot.skill2:
Tidal Totem
cd 12s · 0.3s
Summons a [Totem] at the targeted location, healing allies that stand in the area for 6% Intellect + 6% Faith every 2. Lasts 15.
loot.skill3:
Riptide
cd 18s
90% Intellect + 90% Faith · Water
Splashes a huge water burst in a frontal cone, dealing 90% Intellect + 90% Faith Water to enemies.
loot.passive:
Power of the Tides
Using a [Skill] causes all your active [Totem]s to erupt, dealing 18.75% Intellect + 18.75% Faith Magic to nearby enemies.

Hive Assault
1.1s
62% Strength + 62% Intellect + 0% Strength · Physical · 70% Intellect · Magic

125% Intellect · Magic · 180% Strength · Physical

45% Strength + 45% Intellect · Magic

Bloom
